constraints.clueText: Bram turned up in the party dress.
The one who turned up in the top hat was Juno.

story: The spring carnival has taken over the town square, and three revellers in full costume are lining up for the grand procession while old Peregrine, who organises the pageant, sorts out the order after the gust of confetti sent everyone milling about. Each reveller has a different costume. Using the clues, match every reveller to their costume.
